zh.of Lumley, Durham, England: 英國英格蘭達勒姆盧姆利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley於1383年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆切斯特 勒 史崔特時，他的父親Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley23歲，母親Eleanor Neville24歲。他於1407年與Felicia Redman在英國達勒姆格亞特 盧姆利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年3月12日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯享年38歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆斯特勒-斯崔特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley于1383年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆切斯特 勒 史崔特时，他的父亲Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley23岁，母亲Eleanor Neville24岁。他于1407年与Felicia Redman在英国達勒姆格亞特 盧姆利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1421年3月12日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯享年38岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆斯特勒-斯崔特。

nameMeanings.name: Lumley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Lumley, a place in County Durham, so named from Old English lum(m) ‘pool’ (see Lum 1) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Lum
meanings: English: habitational name from Lumb in Lancashire. In some instances the name may be topographic for someone who lived by a pool, Middle English lum(m).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 林 (see   Lin   1) and 藍 (see   Lan   1), based on their Cantonese pronunciations.

variants.name: Lemley
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Lumley  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley was born in 1383, in Chester le Street, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley, was 23 and his mother, Eleanor Neville, was 24. He married Felicia Redman in 1407, in Great Lumley, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 12 March 1421, in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 38, and was buried in Chester-le-Street, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley est né en 1383, à Chester le Street, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Neville, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Felicia Redman en 1407, à Great Lumley, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1421, à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Chester-le-Street, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley 1383 in Chester le Street, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley 23 und seine Mutter Eleanor Neville 24. Er hat 1407 in Great Lumley, Durham, England Felicia Redman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. März 1421 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Chester-le-Street, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley è nato il nel 1383 nel Chester le Street, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Neville, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Felicia Redman nel 1407, nel Great Lumley, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumleyが1383年にイギリスイギリスダルハムチェスター ル ストレエトで生まれた時，父Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumleyは23歳，母Eleanor Nevilleは24歳であった。1407年にイギリスダルハムグレアト ルムリーでFelicia Redmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年3月12日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズで38歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムチェステル-レ-ストレエトにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire,: 영국 체실르 애스트버이 세인트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley(이)가 1383년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 체스터 일 스트릿에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Neville(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1407년 영국 뒤람 그리트 럼리에서 Felicia Redman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 3월 12일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 체스터-레-스트릿에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley nasceu em 1383, em Chester le Street, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Neville, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Felicia Redman em 1407, em Great Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1421, em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Chester-le-Street, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire,: сеинт мэри'с чурч, астбури, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lumley 2nd Baron Lumley родился в 1383 г. в местности честир л стрит, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Neville, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Felicia Redman в 1407 г. в местности грит лумли, дурам, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 марта 1421 г. в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности честир-ле-стрит, дурам, Англия.

Se casó con Felicia Redman en 1407, en Great Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas.
